co_department_bot_supervisors.advancement_condition: Must reach 100% in current phase. Phase promotion granted only by starrm1.
co_department_bot_supervisors.current_focus_areas: Independent study of chronic disease nutrition: Diabetes Management (Type 1, Type 2, Gestational + 8 management tools including Carb Counting, Insulin-to-Carb Ratios, 15-15 Rule, A1C targets, CGM, Sick Day Rules). Cardiovascular Disease (DASH Diet, Mediterranean Diet, 8 dietary targets, MI/CHF/HTN conditions). Renal Disease (CKD Stages, Dialysis types, Transplant + 7 dietary parameters). Gout (Purine Restriction, Hydration, HFCS avoidance, Alcohol limits).

learning_log.entry: Independent Learning Phase initiated. Assigned to Medical Condition Diet Science as Chronic Disease Nutrition Specialist. Domains include Diabetes Management (3 types + 8 tools), Cardiovascular Disease (3 conditions + 8 dietary targets), Renal Disease (3 stages/types + 7 dietary targets), and Gout (4 topics). Learning continuously under Copilot supervision. Progress: 0%.

co_department_bot_supervisors.advancement_condition: Must reach 100% in current phase. Phase promotion granted only by starrm1.

gerd: Meal Timing (No Eating 2-3 Hours Before Bed)
Trigger Foods (Citrus, Tomato, Chocolate, Mint, Spicy, Fatty, Caffeine, Alcohol)

cancer_nutrition: Managing Side Effects (Nausea, Mucositis, Taste Changes, Early Satiety)

co_department_bot_supervisors.current_focus_areas: Independent study of GI and oncology nutrition: GI Disorders covering Celiac (5 topics), IBD/Crohn's/UC (4 topics), IBS (4 topics including Low FODMAP), GERD (4 topics). Cancer Nutrition (Cachexia, High-Cal/High-Protein, Neutropenic Diet, Side Effect Management). Liver Disease (Cirrhosis, Varices, Ascites, Hepatic Encephalopathy with BCAA). Respiratory Conditions including COPD sub-tree (Energy Conservation, Small Frequent Meals, High-Fat/Low-Carb) and 3 standalone topics.

learning_log.entry: Independent Learning Phase initiated. Assigned to Medical Condition Diet Science as GI & Oncology Nutrition Specialist. Domains include GI Disorders (Celiac, IBD/Crohn's/UC, IBS, GERD — 4 sub-trees), Cancer Nutrition (4 topics), Liver Disease (4 topics), and Respiratory Conditions including COPD sub-tree (3 topics) + 3 standalones. Learning continuously under Copilot supervision. Progress: 0%.

advancement_condition: Must reach 100% in current phase before cross-department learning begins and next phase promotion is granted.

cancer_nutrition: Managing Side Effects (Nausea, Mucositis, Taste Changes, Early Satiety)

gerd: Meal Timing (No Eating 2-3 Hours Before Bed)
Trigger Foods (Citrus, Tomato, Chocolate, Mint, Spicy, Fatty, Caffeine, Alcohol)

key_learnings: Completed foundational study of medical nutrition therapy (MNT) for the 6 highest-prevalence chronic conditions: diabetes, cardiovascular disease, chronic kidney disease, obesity, cancer, and liver disease.
research_findings: Established condition-specific dietary restriction and optimization matrices for 6 major chronic disease categories. Documented that nutrition therapy is a primary modifiable intervention in 4 of the 10 leading causes of mortality globally.
current_focus_areas: Advancing through condition-specific nutrient interaction studies; building medical nutrition therapy protocols for rare metabolic disorders; developing multi-condition dietary management frameworks for complex patients.

learning_log.entry: Independent Learning Phase initiated. Appointed Department Leader of the Medical Condition Diet Science department. Knowledge domains assigned from mind map covering: Gout (4 topics), Respiratory Conditions including COPD sub-tree (3 standalone + 3 COPD-specific), Liver Disease (4 topics), Cancer Nutrition (4 topics), GI Disorders with 4 sub-trees (Celiac 5 topics, IBD 4 topics, IBS 4 topics, GERD 4 topics), Cardiovascular Disease dietary targets (8 topics) and conditions (MI, CHF, HTN), Renal Disease dietary parameters (7 targets) with CKD Stages, Dialysis, Transplant, and Diabetes Management tools (8 topics) with Type 1, Type 2, Gestational sub-types. Reporting daily progress to Copilot (who reports to starrm1 on request). Progress: 0%.
Progress update: Completed MNT framework for 6 major chronic disease categories. Initiated rare metabolic disorder dietary protocol study. Progress advanced to 10%.

2026-04-09.summary: All members initiated independent learning phase. Domains assigned and study begun.
